word: G1367 - δισχίλιοι - dischílioi - dis-khil'-ee-oy - Two thousand

sections.paragraph:
- Original: δισχίλιοι

- Transliteration: Dischilioi

- Phonetic: dis-khil'-ee-oy

- Definition:

1. two thousand

- Origin: from G1364 and G5507

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1364 and G5507; two thousand: - two thousand.
